headline: Should VICI Stock Be in Your Portfolio Pre-Q1 Earnings?
summary: VICI Properties gears up for Q1 earnings results, with revenues expected to rise 3.6% and AFFO per share up 5.2%, backed by CPI-linked leases and portfolio growth.
